title: PartnerOpenBankingEndUser
description: Contains details about the person or entity making the lending decision.

name.description: Name of the lender or entity.

address.description: Street address or P.O. Box information (include apartment or unit numbers).

city.description: Name of the city, town, district, or similar regional entity.

state.description: State, county, province, region, or equivalent.

phone.description: Phone number of the lender or entity.
